# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover the best ant farms to buy and live queen ants for your colony. Start your ant keeping journey with expert-curated setups and guidance.

### Start a Colony
https://example.com/start
Everything you need to start a thriving ant colony: live queens, complete farm setups, and step-by-step beginner guides. Your colony awaits!

### Education
https://example.com/education
Learn ant colony care, species identification, and habitat management through our comprehensive educational guides. Perfect for hobbyists and educators alike.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Questions about ant farms or your colony? Our passionate team is ready to help you succeed. Reach out for personalized guidance and recommendations.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - COLONY X

### Cart
https://example.com/cart
Your Cart

https://example.com/checkout

https://example.com/login

https://example.com/account
